subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enraptured by the Abhá Kingdom! Render thanks unto God, for thy heart hath been illumined with the effulgent rays of the Sun of Oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب بملکوت ابهی شکر کن خدا را که باشراقات انوار شمس احدیت قلبت روشن گشت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @predictions and prophecies, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
